title: Monday.listen to item changes in custom object view
excerpt:
I see that the monday.listen event for listening to changes in item columns is not triggered in the custom object view. 
Is there a way to link to boardIds to the monday.listen function so that we get these events?

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see that the monday.listen event for listening to changes in item columns is not triggered in the custom object view.

Is there a way to link to boardIds to the monday.listen function so that we get these events?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

This is not possible right now so I have turned your topic into a request

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @Matias.Monday
